privileged_info_summary: The task expects the outputs baseline_tripinfo.xml, baseline_noise.xml, pasubio_city30.net.xml, city30_tripinfo.xml, and city30_noise.xml to be produced in /home/ga/SUMO_Output/. The validation scripts check that the modified network limits all lanes to a maximum speed limit of 8.34 m/s. The task operates on the real-world 'bologna_pasubio' SUMO scenario, and the validation requires at least 100 traffic trips to be present in both the baseline and modified network simulations.
